descriptions.text:
Metal Slug: 1st Mission is an Action game, developed by Ukiyotei and published by SNK, which was released in Japan in 1999.

As a member of the elite forces squad "Peregrine Falcons," your mission is to eliminate the evil Colonel Bildegaarn. Using the Metal Slug multifunction tank and the Slug Flyer as well as your wits and handgun blast through up to 17 missions in your quest to make the world safe from tyranny. Multiple stage progressions and a gameplay ranking system give reason to play through more than once. In-game save lets the player on the go turn off the Neo Geo Pocket and not lose progress.

Metal Slug 1st Mission is a run and gun video game developed by Ukiyotei and published by SNK. It was released in Japan in 1999 for the Neo Geo Pocket Color and in Europe in 2000.
In 2021, the game was re-released together with its sequel, Metal Slug 2nd Mission, both as part of Metal Slug 1st & 2nd Mission Double Pack on Nintendo Switch and as part of Neo Geo Pocket Color Selection Vol. 1 for Nintendo Switch and PC Steam.
《合金弹头：第一任务》（英語：Metal Slug: 1st Mission）是SNK在1999年於自家掌機Neo Geo Pocket Color發行的越南大戰系列作品電子遊戲。

Metal Slug: 1st Mission est un jeu vidéo de type run and gun développé par Ukiyotei et édité par SNK en 1999 sur la console portable Neo-Geo Pocket Color. C'est une compilation des deux premiers épisodes de la série Metal Slug et Metal Slug 2.

Metal Slug: 1st Mission (メタルスラッグ ファーストミッション?, Metaru Suraggu Fāsuto Misshon) è un videogioco di genere sparatutto a scorrimento sviluppato da Ukiyotei e pubblicato da SNK per la console portatile Neo Geo Pocket Color nel 1999 come parte della serie Metal Slug. Rappresenta il primo capitolo della saga ad essere uscito per una piattaforma portatile.
Il 18 marzo 2021 è stato reso disponibile all'interno della compilation Neo Geo Pocket Color Selection Vol. 1 per Nintendo Switch.
